trigger.title: Content rewrite pipeline - transform deck content for presentations
trigger.body:
## Context
Task MC #61 from Build Product backlog.

## Description
Implement the content rewrite pipeline that transforms raw deck content into polished presentation text using AI.

## Requirements
- Rewrite extracted deck content for clarity and impact
- Apply presentation writing best practices
- Generate speaker notes
- Support different tones/styles based on audience brief

Label: plan-me
